title: pavonia psilophylla
intro: Pavonia psilophylla, also known as the rock rose or rock hollyhock, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. Pavonia psilophylla is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
